claims.text: All 19 patients in this study had IOPD confirmed by newborn screening and GAA gene sequencing, with ERT initiated at a mean age of 11.05±4.31 days (range 6–23 days).

citations.quote: The mean age of the initial time to ERT was 11.05±4.31 days, and the HI rate was 31.6% (6/19).
confirmatory diagnoses using GAA gene sequencing was usually performed in 5 days passing their newborn hearing screenings

claims.text: The overall hearing impairment rate in this IOPD cohort (which includes patients carrying c.1935C>A p.D645E) was 31.6% (6/19) after early ERT initiated at mean age 11.05 days.

citations.quote: the patients in our cohort had early ERT initiation time and a lower hearing impairment rate (with an average ERT initiation time of 11.05 days and 31.6% hearing impairment in the last evaluation after treatment)
